name: lattice
title: Lattice
description: Fast Raycast capture and CLI operations for a local Lattice context vault.
author: ejohane

commands.name: capture-thought
commands.title: Capture Thought
commands.description: Save a quick note with local context.

commands.name: pending-captures
commands.title: Pending Captures
commands.description: List captures waiting for external agent ingestion.

commands.name: mark-ingested
commands.title: Mark Ingested
commands.description: Mark one or more pending captures as ingested.

commands.name: run-doctor
commands.title: Run Doctor
commands.description: Check vault layout and queue readability.

commands.name: create-pack
commands.title: Create Pack
commands.description: Create a portable pack of pending captures and skills.

commands.name: install-skills
commands.title: Install Skills
commands.description: Install or update bundled vault skills.

commands.name: open-pending-queue
commands.title: Open Queue
commands.description: Open pending and ingested queue files.

commands.name: open-screenshots
commands.title: Open Screenshots
commands.description: Open screenshot and captured asset files.

commands.name: open-instructions
commands.title: Open Agent Skills
commands.description: Open vault instructions for external agents.

preferences.name: latticePath
preferences.title: Lattice Path
preferences.description: Path or command name used to run the Lattice CLI. Defaults to the path configured by `lattice apps install raycast`, then `lattice` on PATH.

preferences.name: vaultPath
preferences.title: Vault Path
preferences.description: Optional override for the local vault folder. Defaults to the vault configured by `lattice apps install raycast`.
